name: ioquake3
description: A Quake 3 Arena dedicated server powered by ioquake3. Compiled natively from source.

name: ioquake3
description: ioquake3 is a modernized game engine for Quake III Arena, focused on bug fixes, improved performance, and enhanced security for dedicated servers.

notes.text: Legal Requirement: You must upload your retail pak0.pk3 file to /opt/ioquake3/baseq3/ to play.
The server uses UDP port 27960 by default. Ensure this is open in your firewall.
Compilation from source occurs during install; while it only uses ~1GB RAM.
